title: Population Health Insights - Eli Lilly
description:
This space provides population health analytics and claims insights for Eli Lilly, enabling analysis of patient demographics, medical claims, diagnoses, and enrollment patterns.

**Capabilities:**
- Analyze patient demographics (age, gender, geography), enrollment duration, and benefit types.
- Track claim counts, diagnoses, procedures, locations of care, and payment types across time.
- Assess total charges, allowed amounts, and financial ratios at monthly and yearly levels.
- Identify patterns in diagnoses and procedures linked to claim and enrollment data.

**Limitations:**
- Does not include clinical outcomes or detailed medical histories.
- Data is limited to available claims, diagnoses, and enrollment fields—no linked pharmacy or lab records.
- Patient-level longitudinal tracking may be constrained by enrollment period and data quality flags.
